category_sources: Official X.Org/freedesktop repository identifies xwininfo as a window information utility for X.
source_facts.description: Print information about windows on an X server.
display_name_sources: Official X.Org/freedesktop repository and man page use xwininfo.
docs_sources: Official X.Org man page is the dedicated command documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official freedesktop GitLab project page.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official freedesktop GitLab source project for xorg/app/xwininfo; freedesktop cgit mirror lists the same GitLab clone URL.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was determined.
tags_sources: Official repository describes it as the window information utility for X.
source_facts.description says it prints information about windows on an X server.
